summary: Mercedes prodigy Kimi Antonelli arrives at Silverstone as the man to beat after claiming pole position and sprint victory, but a record 180,000-strong home crowd will desperately hope he falters and Lewis Hamilton seizes a chance for a fairytale British win. Ferrari's Charles Leclerc lurks just behind on the grid, ready to exploit any Mercedes miscalculation and mount a genuine championship challenge. A dominant Antonelli victory would extend his points lead decisively, potentially putting the championship conversation out of reach before the summer break.
